summary: Created importService.js with pure-JS CSV parsers for Gumroad products and email lists. Added POST /api/admin/import/gumroad-csv and POST /api/admin/import/email-list endpoints (memory-storage multer, admin-auth protected). Added 'Import Tools' sidebar section in admin.html with Gumroad and email list import panels including per-import result display. Both tasks share a single importService.js as planned.
suggestion: Next: Gumroad OAuth/API import (live sync, not just CSV export) as a follow-up to task 006. Also, 004-P2-file-versioning.md and 005-P2-merchant-fulfillment-provider-ui.md are the next unblocked tasks from AGENT_TASKS.md.
